projectDescription: An Obsidian plugin that converts Canvas text cards into permanent Markdown files, automatically organizing them by color into folders while preserving all visual connections as backlinks.
keyFeatures: Atomic materialization of Canvas text nodes into .md files with a single right-click
Automatic folder hierarchy based on card color (Yellow, Grey, Green, Purple, etc.)
Persistent connection preservation — arrows become Connected Nodes backlink sections
Smart YAML frontmatter with canvas_id and canvas_color fields
Visual sync — dragging a materialized file back onto Canvas restores its original color
Clean filename sanitization removing Markdown headers, backticks, and illegal characters
Support for both single and multi-card selection via context menus
publicApiSurface: sanitizeFileName(name: string): string — filename sanitization utility
canvas:node:added event (monkey-patched for color sync on file drop)
colorFolderMap — maps color codes 0-6 to folder names (Default, Red, Orange, Yellow, Blue, Green, Purple)
Connected Nodes section appended to materialized files
